title: Fourth Impact
html:
"Making something... Nurturing something is really great. You can see and learn so many things from the process."
Please help improve this article or section by expanding it.
If you have questions on what to improve/expand, please discuss on the talk page.

Fourth impact is an attempt orchestrated by Gendo Ikari to awaken Evangelion 13 and dispose of Kaworu Nagisa. In Evangelion: 3.0 + 1.0, it occurs together with Additional Impact, and gives access to Anti-Universe through the Evangelion Imaginary.


This article bears the unpleasant designation of "Stub." This is a Bad Thing. Provide a great service to NGE fan-geeks everywhere by making it awesomer!
summary: Fourth impact is an attempt orchestrated by Gendo Ikari to awaken Evangelion 13 and dispose of Kaworu Nagisa. In Evangelion: 3.0 + 1.0, it occurs together with Additional Impact, and gives access to Anti-Universe through the Evangelion Imaginary.
